chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

text: 2952 - رَوَى عُمَرُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَخْرُجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ لِيَعْتَمِرَ أَحْرَمَ مِنَ اَلْجِعْرَانَةِ وَ اَلْحُدَيْبِيَةِ وَ مَا أَشْبَهَهُمَا وَ مَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْ مَكَّةَ يُرِيدُ اَلْعُمْرَةَ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ مُعْتَمِراً لَمْ يَقْطَعِ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ حَتَّى يَنْظُرَ إِلَى اَلْكَعْبَةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2952 - Umar ibn Yazid narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Whoever wishes to leave Mecca to perform Umrah should enter Ihram from Al-Ji'ranah, Al-Hudaybiyah, or similar locations. And whoever leaves Mecca intending Umrah and then enters in the state of Ihram should not stop reciting the Talbiyah until they see the Ka'bah."
